heading: Permissions Required
body:
> **Note:** 
>
> To use [$out](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/out) to write to
> a collection in a different database on the same Atlas cluster,
> your Atlas cluster must be on MongoDB version 7.0 or later.

You must be a database user with one of the following roles:

- [readWriteAnyDatabase](manual/reference/built-in-roles)

- [atlasAdmin](manual/reference/built-in-roles)

- A custom role with the following privileges:

  - [insert](manual/reference/privilege-actions) and

  - [remove](manual/reference/privilege-actions)
